items.name: Tripura Forest Department – Forester, Forest Guard – 271 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Tripura Forest Department Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 271 Forester, Forest Guard Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tripura Forest Department Recruitment 2026: 271 Forester, Forest Guard vacancies. Apply online from 1 May to 31 May 2026 at forest.tripura.gov.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: Forest Guard: Level-6 (Rs. 5700-24000 + GP 2100) Forester: Level-7 (Rs. 5700-24000 + GP 2200)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted in online mode only through the official portal. The step-by-step process is as follows:

basic_details.job_title: Tripura PSC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tripura PSC Recruitment 2026 offers 08 vacancies for Junior Engineer posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech, Diploma can apply online from 19-05-2026 to 12-06-2026 through the official Tripura PSC website, tpsc.tripura.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Electrical Engineering for Grade-I and Diploma in Electrical Engineering for Grade-II.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Tripura PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Tripura Public Service Commission Junior Engineer

items.name: Tripura High Court – Junior Grade Translator – 5 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tripura High Court Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Junior Grade Translator. Candidates with M.A Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 13-05-2026, and closes on 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Tripura High Court official website thc.tripura.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters Degree in any official language of Tripura with proficiency in English OR Masters Degree in English with proficiency in any official language of Tripura. Proficiency in computer use is necessary. Law Graduate will be given due weightage.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.5700-24000/- with Grade Pay Rs.4200/- (Revised to Level-10)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator Recruitment 2026

items.name: Tripura PSC – Assistant Technical Officer – 220 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Tripura PSC ATO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 220 Assistant Technical Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tripura PSC Recruitment 2026 offers 220 vacancies for Assistant Technical Officer posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech/BE, MCA can apply online from 12-05-2026 to 05-06-2026 through the official Tripura PSC website, tpsc.tripura.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate of Information Technology, Dept. of Industries & Commerce (IT), Govt. of Tripura

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Band-3: Rs. 10230–34,800/-, Grade Pay Rs. 4800/- (Level-13, Tripura State Pay Matrix 2018)

selection_process: Written Examination (170 marks) + Interview/Personality Test (30 marks)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the TPSC Online Application Portal, accessible on the official website https://tpsc.tripura.gov.in. Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 12-05-2026 to 05-06-2026 (5:30 PM). New users (first-time applicants) must complete One Time Profile Registration (OTPR) on the TPSC website before applying - a User ID will be generated and sent to the registered mobile number/email ID upon successful registration.
seo_tags: Tripura Public Service Commission Assistant Technical Officer Recruitment 2026
